subcodes.first_line: Hath the earth borne one whom no ties of kinship can withhold from the Lord of all creation, and who casteth behind him all lineage and allusions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل حملت الارض بالذی لایمنعه النسبه عن مالک البریه و یدع عن ورائه النسب و الاشارات
subcodes.subjects: @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for protection
